game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Mysterium:** Mysterium is a cooperative deduction game where one player acts as a Ghost and up to six other players are Psychics, all working together to solve a murder mystery within seven game rounds. The Ghost player, unable to speak, communicates solely by sending abstract "vision cards" from their hand of seven to Psychics, who must interpret these visual clues to correctly identify their assigned suspect, location, and murder weapon. Psychics place their intuition tokens on their chosen cards, and after a set number of Psychics have made their choice, the Ghost confirms or denies their selections, with correct guesses advancing the Psychic to the next stage of deduction. Progression involves unlocking new story chapters for each Psychic character by completing mysteries, while additional suspect, location, weapon, and scenario cards can be acquired to expand gameplay variety. The team wins if all Psychics correctly identify their individual elements and then collectively deduce the final murder solution before the seven rounds conclude, otherwise, the mystery remains unsolved.
game_info.description: You are a Psychic trying to solve a murder mystery by interpreting abstract vision cards sent by a Ghost. Each round, the Ghost will send you a vision card to help you identify the correct Suspect, Location, and Weapon. Study the vision carefully, then select your choice. Progress through all three stages before time runs out to solve the mystery and win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through card selections
Space: Confirm your selection
Z: View current vision card in detail (hold)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates player can navigate through the game interface, select cards, and progress through different stages. Tests the core interaction loop of receiving visions and making selections.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through available cards using arrow keys and make selections with space bar. Progress through Suspect, Location, and Weapon stages sequentially. Make deliberate choices to ensure the selection mechanism works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully navigates all UI elements, makes selections at each stage, and reaches the final reveal phase. All input responses should be registered correctly and the game should progress without errors through all three deduction stages.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test that implements an optimal strategy to solve the mystery correctly. Tests the Ghost's vision card logic and validates that matching patterns lead to successful deduction and game victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze the vision cards sent by the Ghost and match them with the correct suspect, location, and weapon cards based on visual similarities (colors, shapes, patterns). Use knowledge of the correct answers embedded in the game state to make perfect choices.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test achieves a perfect score by correctly identifying all three elements (Suspect, Location, Weapon) and reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state. The victory screen displays with congratulatory message and final statistics.
